channel.title: ACIM Daily Minute
channel.description: Daily readings from A Course in Miracles. One-minute text passages and the 365 Workbook Lessons.

item.title: Daily Minute — May 6, 2026
item.description: One walks with you Who gently answers all your fears with this one merciful reply, “It is not so.” He points to all the gifts you have each time the thought of poverty oppresses you, and speaks of His Companionship when you perceive yourself as lonely and afraid. Yet He reminds you still of one thing more you had forgotten. For His touch on you has made you like Himself.The gifts you have are not

item.title: Lesson 24: “I do not perceive my own best interests.”
item.description: “I do not perceive my own best interests.” In no situation which arises do you realize the outcome that would make you happy.Therefore you have no guide to appropriate action, and no way of judging the results. What you do is determined by your perception of the situation, and that perception is wrong. It is inevitable, then, that you will not serve your own best interests.Yet they are your only g
